name: PortalPulse
tagline: One inbox for every GC portal deadline you're juggling.
description: Subs forward GC portal notification emails to a dedicated address; an AI parser extracts deadlines (COI renewals, pay app windows, lien waiver requests) into one unified calendar across every GC, regardless of which portal each GC mandates.
ethics_concerns: Email forwarding means handling potentially sensitive business correspondence and financial deadline data — requires clear data handling and retention transparency.
AI parsing errors on legal/financial deadlines (lien waivers, pay app windows) could have real consequences if users over-trust output.
